---
title: "<i>Saturday Magazine, The</i>"
---

## <i>Saturday Magazine, The</i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

This periodical was founded in 1832 as a penny magazine for the working classes, under the auspices of the SPCK;  its publisher was John W. Parker.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
